description_long: This house is a modern, boxy residential structure with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall surfaces, with the front facade showcasing a prominent entryway flanked by large windows. The house is surrounded by several trees and shrubs, suggesting a landscaped urban or suburban setting. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some larger panes providing ample natural light. The entryway includes a small overhang and steps leading up to the main door, which is centrally located. The overall design is minimalist, with an emphasis on functionality and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, dark and light exterior walls, and a landscaped setting with trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a landscaped area with several trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and a cluster of trees and shrubs to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with the back facade mostly obscured by trees, showing the flat roof and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the dark exterior wall, side windows, and a curved line of trees and shrubs.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small overhang and steps, flanked by large windows, minimal decorative elements
